channel.title: Neural Newz Daily
channel.description: Daily AI news and research papers curated from top labs and VC firms.
channel.itunes:author: Neural Newz

item.title: Neural Newz Daily - May 13, 2026
item.description:
Welcome to Neural Newz, your daily download on the latest breakthroughs and essential updates in the world of artificial intelligence. I'm your host, and today we're diving into some truly fascinating developments, from advanced algorithmic design to critical advancements in LLM efficiency and reliability.
First up, a major announcement from **Google DeepMind**, who have unveiled **AlphaEvolve**. This isn't just another coding tool; it's an evolutionary coding agent powered by Gemini, designed ...

item.title: Neural Newz Daily - May 13, 2026
item.description: Welcome to Neural Newz. There were no major AI breakthroughs in the last 24 hours. See you tomorrow!...
